world_news.headline: Oil prices rise after Trump says Iranian ship seized
world_news.summary: Energy markets have seen wild swings since the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February.

world_news.headline: Funerals held across Lebanon during 10-day ceasefire
world_news.summary: Mourners across Lebanon are burying victims of the war with Israel during a 10-day ceasefire.

world_news.headline: What we know about the Iranian ship seized by the US
world_news.summary: The US has intercepted an Iranian ship entering the Gulf as part of its naval blockade, US President Donald Trump has said.

world_news.headline: Middle East crisis live: Iran sends mixed signals on talks after US seizes ship
world_news.summary:
Official tells Reuters it is ‘positively reviewing’ involvement in negotiations after earlier saying it had no plans for a new round of talks

The US has just released some more footage of the encounter with the Iranian flagged vessel, the M/V Touska.

In a post on X, US Central Command said US Marines had departed the amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli by helicopter and rappelled onto the Iranian-flagged vessel.

world_news.summary: Prosecutors in California are charging rapper D4vd with the murder of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez.

world_news.headline: Gunman kills Canadian woman, injures six at Mexico’s Teotihuacan pyramids
world_news.summary: Canadian tourist is killed and 6 people injured in shooting at Teotihuacan pyramid near Mexico City, government says.

world_news.headline: UK PM Starmer admits Mandelson mistake, rejects resignation calls
world_news.summary: PM insists he did not know security officials had recommended Mandelson be sidelined due to Epstein links.

world_news.headline: US singer D4vd charged with murder stemming from death of missing teenage girl
world_news.summary: Prosecutors say the singer, real name David Anthony Burke, could face life in prison due to the nature of the case.

world_news.headline: Report finds Gaza needs more than $71bn in next decade for recovery
world_news.summary: Devastated sectors in Palestinian enclave include housing, health, education, commerce and agriculture, EU and UN find.

world_news.summary: The first round of the 2026 NBA Playoffs is officially underway. Here are the key things to look out for in each series.
